title: Kumararama
tagline: Kumararama — spiritual town of Andhra Pradesh

overview.short: Kumararama or Bhimarama (Chalukya Kumararama Bhimeswara Temple) is one of the five Pancharama Kshetras that are sacred to the Hindu god Shiva.
overview.description: Kumararama or Bhimarama (Chalukya Kumararama Bhimeswara Temple) is one of the five Pancharama Kshetras that are sacred to the Hindu god Shiva. The temple is located in Samalkota of Kakinada district in the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. The other four temples are Amararama at Amaravati(Dist. Guntur), Draksharama at Draksharama (Dist.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Samalkota
topPlaces.description: Samalkota, commonly known as Samarlakota, is a town in Kakinada district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. The town forms a part of Kakinada Urban Development Authority.

topPlaces.name: Mandavya Narayana Swamy Temple
topPlaces.description: Sri Mandavya Narayana Swamy Temple is a historic Hindu temple dedicated to Vishnu located in Samarlakota of Kakinada district, Andhra Pradesh, India. It is situated near the Pancharama Kshetra of Kumararama in the Chalukya Bhimavaram suburb of Samarlakota.

topPlaces.name: Vadlamuru
topPlaces.description: Vadlamuru is a village in Peddapuram Mandal in Kakinada district of Andhra Pradesh, India.

topPlaces.name: Anuru, Peddapuram mandal
topPlaces.description: Anuru is an Indian village in Peddapuram Mandal in Kakinada district of Andhra Pradesh in the southern part of India. Lord Sri Rama Sameta Satyanayarana Swamy temple has been constructed in 2007 with help of villagers as well as donors.

topPlaces.name: Peddapuram
topPlaces.description: Peddapuram is a town in the Kakinada district of Andhra Pradesh in South India. The town also forms a part of Godavari Urban Development Authority.

topPlaces.name: Kandrakota
topPlaces.description: Kandrakota is a village in Kakinada district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is located in Peddapuram mandal of Peddapuram revenue division.

topPlaces.name: Peddapuram mandal
topPlaces.description: Peddapuram mandal is one of the 21 mandals in Kakinada district of the state of Andhra Pradesh, India. Its headquarters are located at Peddapuram.

topPlaces.name: Kattamuru
topPlaces.description: Kattamuru is a major panchayath village in Peddapuram Mandal of Kakinada district of Andhra Pradesh in South India.

items.note: Samalkota, commonly known as Samarlakota, is a town in Kakinada district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. The town forms a part of Kakinada Urban Development Authority.

Sri Mandavya Narayana Swamy Temple is a historic Hindu temple dedicated to Vishnu located in Samarlakota of Kakinada district, Andhra Pradesh, India. It is situated near the Pancharama Kshetra of Kumararama in the Chalukya Bhimavaram suburb of Samarlakota.
Vadlamuru is a village in Peddapuram Mandal in Kakinada district of Andhra Pradesh, India.

Anuru is an Indian village in Peddapuram Mandal in Kakinada district of Andhra Pradesh in the southern part of India. Lord Sri Rama Sameta Satyanayarana Swamy temple has been constructed in 2007 with help of villagers as well as donors.
Peddapuram is a town in the Kakinada district of Andhra Pradesh in South India. The town also forms a part of Godavari Urban Development Authority.
Kandrakota is a village in Kakinada district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is located in Peddapuram mandal of Peddapuram revenue division.
Peddapuram mandal is one of the 21 mandals in Kakinada district of the state of Andhra Pradesh, India. Its headquarters are located at Peddapuram.
Kattamuru is a major panchayath village in Peddapuram Mandal of Kakinada district of Andhra Pradesh in South India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kumararama?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kumararama is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

The nearest airport is Rajahmundry Airport (38 km) and the nearest railway station is Visakhapatnam Junction (142 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kumararama?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kumararama at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kumararama?
faq.a: Stays in Kumararama start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kumararama?
faq.a: The top attractions are Samalkota, Mandavya Narayana Swamy Temple, Vadlamuru, Anuru, Peddapuram mandal, Peddapuram.
